items.name: 8位复古游戏
items.description: 像素艺术，红白机时代怀旧风
items.prompt: Pixel art, NES era, nostalgia. 8-bit aesthetic with chunky pixels and limited color palette. Classic video game feel with pixel-perfect graphics. Chiptune-inspired visual rhythm. Bold, blocky typography. Nostalgic gaming atmosphere.

items.name: 大胆编辑风
items.description: Wired杂志风格，高冲击力新闻设计
items.prompt: Wired Magazine, Vox, high-impact journalism. Style: Magazine spread aesthetic. Visuals: Asymmetrical grid, massive typography for the headline, high-contrast color blocks (Yellow/Black or Red/White). Incorporate collage-style elements and abstract shapes. Grainy texture overlay.

items.name: 电影海报
items.description: 好莱坞大片风格，戏剧性光效
items.prompt: Hollywood blockbuster, dramatic lighting. Style: Cinematic realism, dramatic lighting (teal and orange). Layout: Central hero character or object with credits-style text at the bottom for data points. Title: Massive, metallic 3D typography. Texture: Film grain, lens flare.

items.name: Claude风格
items.description: Anthropic/Claude风格的温暖人文学术设计
items.prompt:
The specific style of the PPT should follow the "warm academic humanism" design in the "Anthropic/Claude style".
Background: Use warm beige/cream (#F3F0E9) as the base color to mimic the texture of high-quality paper.
Fonts: Use elegant Serif for headings and modern Sans-serif for body text.
Color scheme: The main colors are terracotta red (#D67052) and mustard yellow (#F0B857), complemented by deep navy blue as an accent. Avoid neon colors or pure black.
Visual elements: Adopt a grid layout that emphasizes typesetting. The illustration style should be abstract, organic black hand-drawn line art placed on solid terracotta red blocks. Some key information should use a card layout.
Charts: Flat, minimalist bar charts that emphasize data comparison and eliminate unnecessary borders.
items.reason: 本地版保留了同一视觉核心，但补充了页面类型模板、技术参数、中文说明和来源注释，复用价值明显更高。

items.name: 黏土动画
items.description: 橡皮泥定格动画，手工质感
items.prompt: Plasticine, stop-motion, handmade texture. Visuals: All elements look like hand-sculpted plasticine clay with visible fingerprints. Lighting: Soft studio lighting with realistic shadows. Text: Formed from rolled-out clay snakes. Background: Cardboard set design. Mood: Whimsical and tactile.
items.reason: 本地版的材质、光照、构图和页面模板约束更完整，比来源站点的短提示词更适合稳定生成。

items.name: 漫画英雄
items.description: 复古漫威/DC半调网点动作风格
items.prompt: Vintage Marvel/DC, halftone dots, dynamic action. Layout: Dynamic panels with jagged borders. Visuals: Superhero character demonstrating the concept. Text: Inside speech bubbles and yellow narration boxes. Style: Halftone dot shading, bold black outlines, vibrant primary colors (CMYK).

items.name: 企业SaaS
items.description: 深色UI高对比度，适合SaaS产品展示
items.prompt: SaaS style, dark UI, high contrast. Visuals: Flat design, simple bar charts and line graphs. Palette: Dark slate background with electric blue and emerald green accents. Typography: Roboto or Inter style, clean and legible. Include percentage callouts.

items.name: 暗黑科技
items.description: 赛博朋克未来UI，霓虹点缀
items.prompt: Cyberpunk, crypto, developer focused. Style: Futuristic UI. Background: Deep black/charcoal. Accents: Neon Cyan and Magenta. Visuals: Glowing thin lines, glassmorphism effects on cards, monospaced coding fonts. Schematic technical drawing aesthetic.

items.name: 渐变英雄漏斗
items.description: 营销转化流程，现代渐变设计
items.prompt: Marketing, conversion, flow. Visuals: A wide-to-narrow 3D funnel shape floating in center. Coloring: Smooth, modern mesh gradients (Instagram style brand colors).

items.name: 宜家风格
items.description: 分步说明手册风格
items.prompt:
Step-by-step, instruction manual (Ikea style).
Style: Flat 2.0 vector illustration. Layout: S-Curve path winding down the page. Visuals: 5 distinct steps represented by character illustrations interacting with objects. Connectors: Dotted lines. Colors: Bright primary colors on white.

items.name: 思维导图
items.description: 神经网络风格的头脑风暴图
items.prompt: Neural network, brainstorming web. Layout: Central node with organic branches extending outward. Visuals: Nodes are colored bubbles connected by curved bezier lines. Style: Organic, biological interface, clean UI. White background with colorful distinct branches.

items.name: 极简数据叙事
items.description: 简洁的瑞士设计风格，大量留白
items.prompt: Clean, ample whitespace, Swiss design influence. Style: Clean Minimalist. Visuals: Simple sans-serif typography (Helvetica style), soft neutral background, monochromatic icons. No clutter, no gradients. Focus on negative space and alignment. Render text labels clearly.

items.name: 小黄人乱斗
items.description: 动画电影风格，欢乐小黄人
items.prompt: Animated movie, yellow helpers, chaotic fun. Visuals: Small yellow capsule-shaped characters with goggles and denim overalls assisting with the data. Mood: Playful and energetic. Layout: The characters are holding up the charts or building the graphs. Background: Industrial lab or bright blue sky. Colors: Banana yellow and denim blue.

items.name: 霓虹夜生活
items.description: 赛博朋克拉斯维加斯霓虹灯管
items.prompt: Cyberpunk, Las Vegas, glowing tubes. Background: Dark brick wall texture. Visuals: Data points represented by glowing glass neon tubes. Colors: Electric pink, cyan, and lime green. Text: Cursive neon typography connected by wires. Atmosphere: Smoky, noir, high contrast.

items.name: 流程图
items.description: 工程蓝图风格流程图
items.prompt: Engineering, logic flow, algorithm. Visuals: Geometric shapes (diamonds for decisions, rectangles for actions). Connectors: Right-angle elbow arrows. Style: Blueprint aesthetic, blue background with white lines. High technical accuracy.

items.name: 瑞克和莫蒂风格
items.description: 成人动画科幻喜剧风格
items.prompt: Rick and Morty-inspired illustration style. Bold outlines, exaggerated expressions, and quirky character designs. Sci-fi elements with portal guns, alien creatures, and interdimensional themes. Vibrant, slightly unsettling color palette. Chaotic but intentional compositions. Adult animation aesthetic with humor and edge.

items.name: 手绘笔记
items.description: 笔记本头脑风暴风格，涂鸦元素
items.prompt: Notebook, napkin math, brainstorming. Background: Crumpled graph paper texture. Visuals: Doodle-style thick marker lines, hand-drawn arrows, circled text, highlighted emphasis. Font: Realistic handwriting style. Casual and creative vibe.

items.name: 柔和粉彩教育
items.description: 友好亲切的教育设计风格
items.prompt: Friendly, approachable, kindergarten-teacher vibes. Style: Hand-drawn vector feel but polished. Palette: Soft pastels (Mint, Peach, Lavender). Visuals: Rounded shapes, friendly characters, bubble letters for headers. Layout: Vertical flow with numbered steps. approachable and kind aesthetic.

items.name: 故事板旅程
items.description: 用户体验漫画叙事
items.prompt: User experience, comic strip, narrative. Visuals: Consistent character moving through a scenario. Text: Captions under each frame. Style: Vector art, semi-realistic.

items.name: TED风格
items.description: 受TED演讲启发的简洁演示风格
items.prompt: TED Style presentation design. Clean, impactful slides with one idea per slide. Large, bold typography on simple backgrounds. High-quality imagery that supports the message. Minimal text, maximum visual impact. Red accent color inspired by TED branding. Focus on storytelling and emotional connection.

items.name: 复古旅行海报
items.description: 装饰艺术风格，国家公园海报
items.prompt: Art Deco, National Parks, WPA style. Style: WPA National Park poster aesthetic. Visuals: Screen-printed texture, flat broad colors, bold geometric mountains or landscapes. Typography: Tall, condensed Art Deco lettering. Palette: Earthy oranges, forest greens, and cream.

items.name: 白板策略
items.description: 创业公司作战室白板风格
items.prompt: Startup war room, dry-erase markers. Visuals: Photo-realistic whiteboard surface with reflection. Content: Drawn with red, blue, and black dry-erase markers. Handwriting: Messy but legible cursive and block letters. Diagrams: Circles, arrows, and underlined key terms. Lighting: Office fluorescent overhead.
